title: Price Schema Deep Sync Fix
summary: Forced provider sync when Backpack API key is saved but price schema cache is empty.
Added multiple IGetPrices/v4 request variants with redacted attempts.
Added tf2-hub-backpack-price-schema-debug.json for HTTP 200 / zero-price cases.
Added Action Feed events for price schema loaded/failed states.
Bumped config.yaml, package.json, build.yaml, Dockerfiles, run.sh, frontend and runtime markers to 5.13.42.
